content:
🔥 ml-intern | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To act as an autonomous ML engineer, automating ML development tasks from research to deployment using the Hugging Face ecosystem.
✨ Key Features: • Autonomous ML code research, writing, and shipping • Integration with Hugging Face ecosystem (docs, papers, datasets, compute) • Interactive and headless CLI modes • Support for various LLMs including local models via LiteLLM • Optional sandbox environment for tool execution
📖 Summary: ml-intern is an open-source AI agent that automates the process of researching, writing, and shipping ML code. It leverages the Hugging Face ecosystem for access to documentation, papers, datasets, and cloud compute, offering both interactive and headless modes for various use cases.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
